## Breaking Boundaries: A Second Biography that Includes Sheela Murthy
The New Year brings with it a new biography, and Sheela Murthy is among five IndianAmerican women leaders whose stories are its focus. Breaking Boundaries also features Jagruti Panwala, Gauthami Vemula Qeijo, Dr. Nimisha Shukla, and Dr. Madhulika Guha Thakurta. Each woman was born in...

## “Being Sheela” a Biography Recently Published by Harper Collins
The critically acclaimed biography “Being Sheela: The Life Journey of an Immigration Attorney” has recently been released by Harper Collins.What is “Being Sheela” about? It explores the life of a woman who has made it her purpose to strive for a better world. With insightful detours...

## Sheela Murthy at IT Serve Synergy 2018
